sglang.title: Refactor decoding logprob and add completion_tokens_wo_jump_forward
sglang.author: comaniac
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Introduce return_text_in_logprobs to GenerateReqInput, so that even /generate could return token logprob in (text, logprob) format instead of (token id, logprob).
Fix a bug in OpenAI completion.
Introduce completion_tokens_wo_jump_forward to metric.

vllm.title: [ROCm] Dockerfile fix for flash-attention build
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This pull request fixes Dockerfile for flash-attention build on ROCm.
